title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Nestle India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Nestle India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Nestle India International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nestle India International Enterprises:
Nestle India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nestle India International Enterprises!
